title: LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER - 211info
text: LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter for lost, homeless, abused, and neglected animals. Offers pets for adoption. 510 NE Harney Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 265-0720 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 265-0720 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 7am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: East of the County Fairgrounds Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
